mapper.sql: answer_id, exam_id, ai_problem_id, answer_text, passed_case_count, is_correct, ai_review, test_case_result, submitted_at, graded_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM exam_answers WHERE exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY ai_problem_id ASC

SELECT
FROM exam_answers ORDER BY answer_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_answers ( exam_id, ai_problem_id, answer_text, passed_case_count, is_correct, ai_review, test_case_result, submitted_at, graded_at ) VALUES ( #{examId}, #{aiProblemId}, #{answerText}, #{passedCaseCount}, #{isCorrect}, #{aiReview}, CAST(#{testCaseResult} AS JSON), #{submittedAt}, #{gradedAt} )

INSERT INTO exam_answers ( exam_id, ai_problem_id, answer_text, submitted_at ) VALUES ( #{examId}, #{aiProblemId}, #{answerText}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE answer_text = VALUES(answer_text), submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_answers SET exam_id = #{examId}, ai_problem_id = #{aiProblemId}, answer_text = #{answerText}, passed_case_count = #{passedCaseCount}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, ai_review = #{aiReview}, test_case_result = CAST(#{testCaseResult} AS JSON), submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, graded_at = #{gradedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE answer_id = #{answerId}

UPDATE exam_answers SET passed_case_count = #{passedCaseCount}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, ai_review = #{aiReview}, test_case_result = CAST(#{testCaseResult} AS JSON), graded_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE answer_id = #{answerId}
